scripts.check:frontend: pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/frontend lint && pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/frontend build && pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/frontend test
scripts.check:worker: pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/worker lint && pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/worker typecheck && pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/worker test && pnpm --filter @ai-tool-chat/worker exec wrangler deploy --dry-run
scripts.check: pnpm run check:repo && pnpm run check:frontend && pnpm run check:worker
